name: api-e2e-testing
description: API E2E Testing: POST -> GET -> SQL Verification (Playwright + TypeScript)

scripts.test:org: cross-env ENTITY=Organization npx playwright test generic-module-e2e
scripts.test:person: cross-env ENTITY=Person npx playwright test generic-module-e2e
scripts.test:guardianship: cross-env ENTITY=Guardianship npx playwright test generic-module-e2e
scripts.test:intake: cross-env ENTITY=IntakeReferral npx playwright test generic-module-e2e
scripts.test:excel:smoke: cross-env MAX_SCENARIOS=2 npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:excel:negative: cross-env TEST_TYPE=negative npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:excel:search: cross-env TEST_TYPE=search npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:excel:nosql: cross-env SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:excel:parallel: cross-env WORKERS=4 npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:org: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=728300_Organization.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:org:smoke: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=728300_Organization.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true MAX_SCENARIOS=2 npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:org-module: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test org-module-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:person: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=614086_Person.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:person:smoke: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=614086_Person.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true MAX_SCENARIOS=2 npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:note-module: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test note-module-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:general-note: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=648018_GeneralNote.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:case-note: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=745048_CaseNote.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
scripts.test:devf1:scratchpad-note: cross-env ENV_NAME=DevF1 EXCEL=648024_ScratchpadNote.xlsx SKIP_SQL=true npx playwright test excel-driven-e2e
